title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 630.462 - Contractors for community psychiatric rehabilitation, reviews, how conducted
text:
630.462.  Contractors for community psychiatric rehabilitation, reviews, how conducted. — All department reviews of contractors for community psychiatric rehabilitation services shall be the same regardless of whether or not a provider is designated as an administrative entity pursuant to section 630.407.
(L. 1995 H.B. 562 § 2)
